PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-21-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Tisa Pedersen for Horace Sturiale (Petitioner).

The Court noted that this is a petition for probate of a holographic will, that the matter is on for hearing because the declarants are interested Parties and that it does not see anyone here to object. The Court finds there is sufficient evidence in support of this being the Decedent's holographic will. The Court granted the petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required. Status on close of estate is set for February 22, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-24-2019 Continued To Aug-20-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-25-2019 Continued To Aug-06-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Tisa Pederson for Horace Sturiale (Petitioner).

Ms. Pederson stated that she filed an amendment on Friday, that she needs to re-publish and re-notice, and that her Client recently discovered a hand written will. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to August 6, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
